name: Onion Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread French bread with one-third of the butter and toast until brown. Set aside.
2. In a soup pot, melt remaining butter. Add onions and sauté until tender. Add stock, salt, and pepper to taste. Stir in flour and mix until smooth. Simmer for 15 minutes.
3. Pour into serving bowls. Place toasted bread on top. Sprinkle with Cheddar cheese and broil until lightly browned.
